wins: Reduced higher-cost CDs issued by corporate treasury
New credit card accounts opened in 2024: 2.4 million
Improved credit card spend up over $17 billion
risks: Commercial real estate office losses are expected to be lumpy
Lower loan balances and loan spread compression impacting auto and personal lending
Credit card charge-offs increased due to higher losses in the credit card portfolio
Seasonally lower trading activity impacting fourth quarter results
Uncertainty around interest rate changes and market conditions
